title: cousinia calocephala subsp. behboudiana
intro: Cousinia calocephala subsp. behboudiana, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is a lesser-known species native to Iran. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Cousinia calocephala subsp. behboudiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
